case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. JLF COLLECTIONS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-09-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-05-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JLF COLLECTIONS LLC ELITE LEATHER COMPANY, LLC MEADOW HOSPITALITY  LIGHTING LLC DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-28-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-24-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-05-2018
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100056322)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-28-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
